title: Personal website defines current mission and philosophy
excerpt: The kehandong.com website succinctly captures his work: 'I work with people who start building earlier than they're supposed to. Early founders, unconventional paths, long-term agency.'
caption: This establishes the core philosophy driving his investment, educational, and organizational work.
quoteText: I work with people who start building earlier than they're supposed to. Early founders, unconventional paths, long-term agency.

mediaItems.title: Integrated systems approach
mediaItems.text: Investing, writing, and building systems around early founders, education, and long-term agency.

title: Inner Journey website documents transformational program
excerpt: The Inner Journey website describes a conscious growth path for founders and leaders, detailing 25+ years of experience and 1000+ lives transformed through a holistic, measurable approach based on ancient wisdom.
caption: This organizational website provides direct evidence of the Inner Journey program's scope, philosophy, and impact.
visualText: Transformational journey for founders and leaders experiencing the cost of scaling without inner alignment.
quoteText: A conscious growth path for founders and leaders experiencing the cost of scaling without inner alignment.

mediaItems.title: 1000+ lives transformed
mediaItems.text: Over 1000 founders and leaders have gone through the Inner Journey program.

mediaItems.title: 25+ years of expertise
mediaItems.text: Program draws on 25+ years of experience in transformational work with leaders.
